assessment.note: Names a specific absence — clear criteria for recognized work — which is a strong negative growth signal; also reveals a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Clearer criteria
new_queue.name: What would clearer criteria look like to you in practice?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific criteria he feels are missing so the recognition gap becomes concrete.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help you make the next few weeks feel more deliberate?
new_queue.description: Finds the smallest useful support without reopening diagnosis or blame.

new_queue.label: Concrete next move
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into an open next-step focus.
